goal: Improve WhatsApp evaluation parser diversity and group sync coverage visibility

plan.step: Broaden evaluation parser variants with TDD coverage
plan.note: Added labels: Materi, Hari/Tanggal, Jam, Hasil Belajar, Lesson Date, Class Time, Lesson Summary.
Bot sends sync summary in group metadata; Flask exposes sync_scan.

plan.step: Display sync status in WhatsApp group table
plan.note: Shows DB count, fetched count, scan time, range, gap/status badge.
pytest dashboard 5 passed, npm bot tests 16 passed, containers rebuilt, bot health 200, web login browser smoke passed on port 6001.

notes: Parser accepts broader Indonesian/English evaluation report variants while still requiring title/date/time/topic/evaluation markers.
Group directory now exposes sync_scan fetched vs database message counts to detect possible WhatsApp Web sync gaps.
WhatsApp Web full sync means all messages currently available to the linked Web session, not guaranteed entire historic phone archive.
